chains.description: 81X class engineering bushed conveyor chain — 3" pitch. Standard engineering class for cement, aggregate, and mining drag conveyors. The most common engineered-class chain in North American bulk handling.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.143, ASME B29.100
performance_tiers.notes: 81X bushed conveyor chain. Most common North American engineered-class chain.

attachment_configs.description: Heavy drag flight, both sides, E4

sprocket_compatibility.notes: Rexnord/Link-Belt sprocket interchangeable with Donghua 81X chain.

chains.description: 81XH heavy-duty engineering bushed chain — same 3" pitch as 81X with heavier plate stock and pin diameter. Used in high-load cement, aggregate, and mining drag conveyors.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.144, ASME B29.100
performance_tiers.notes: 81XH heavy series — heavier plates and pin vs 81X.

chains.description: 81XHH extra-heavy engineering bushed chain. Maximum load rating in the 81X pitch family. Used in cement kiln feed, mining overland conveyors, and heaviest-duty drag conveyor applications.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.145, ASME B29.100
performance_tiers.notes: 81XHH — maximum 3" pitch load. For kiln and overland mining applications.

chains.description: M112 class heavy engineering bushed chain — 112mm pitch. Maximum-load bulk material conveying in heavy mining, cement production, and aggregate processing.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.140
performance_tiers.notes: M112 — heavy engineering class. DIN 8167.

chains.description: M56 class engineering bushed conveyor chain — 56mm pitch. Heavy-duty construction for mining conveyors, cement plants, and bulk material handling. DIN 8167 / ISO compliant.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.135
performance_tiers.notes: M56 bushed engineering class. DIN 8167 standard.

chains.description: M80 class engineering bushed conveyor chain — 80mm pitch. Heavy-duty bulk material conveying. Common in European quarry, sand, gravel, and aggregate plants.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.137
performance_tiers.notes: M80 bushed engineering class. DIN 8167.

chains.display_name: MR56 Engineering Bushed Chain with Rollers
chains.description: MR56 class engineering bushed chain with outer rollers — 56mm pitch. Rollers reduce friction on guide rails. For cement, aggregate, and mining conveyor applications requiring roller-on-rail design.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.136, DIN 8167
performance_tiers.notes: MR56 — M56 with outer rollers. Same tensile but reduced trough friction.

chains.display_name: MR80 Engineering Bushed Chain with Rollers
chains.description: MR80 class engineering bushed chain with outer rollers — 80mm pitch. Roller-on-rail conveyor design for heavy quarry and mining applications.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.138, DIN 8167

chains.description: P102F64 bulk material conveyor chain — 102mm pitch, 64mm face. Drop-forged sidebar construction. Used in cement, aggregate, and heavy mining en-masse drag conveyors.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.148
performance_tiers.notes: P102F64 bulk conveyor. Drop-forged construction.

chains.description: P142F78 heavy bulk material conveyor chain — 142mm pitch, 78mm face. Maximum-capacity drag and en-masse conveyors in mining, cement, and aggregate.

performance_tiers.source: Donghua catalog p.152
performance_tiers.notes: P142F78 heavy bulk conveyor.

chains.description: 2.609" pitch 1578 K-style engineered class chain. CARB pins and bushings, extended pin design. Rated 2,200 lb working load.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord 1578 K-style. No Link-Belt equivalent listed.

chains.description: 6" pitch 2126 engineered class roller chain. Heavier construction than SR196 with larger sidebar. Rated 3,400 lb working load. Cement, aggregate, and bulk drag conveying.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.5
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord 2126 / Link-Belt RS1116.

chains.description: 6" pitch 2180 engineered class roller chain. Heaviest standard 6" pitch engineered class — rated 4,500 lb working load. For maximum capacity drag and bulk conveyors.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.5
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord 2180. No Link-Belt equivalent listed. Heavy capacity 6" engineered chain.

chains.description: 6" pitch 2183 engineered class chain with 3.00" wide roller for maximum material support width. Rated 4,600 lb working load.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.5
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord 2183 / Link-Belt RS951. Wide 3" roller.

chains.description: 6" pitch 2190 engineered class chain with 2.50" wide roller — wider track for stable bulk material support. Rated 3,400 lb working load.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.5
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord 2190 / Link-Belt RS2190. Wide roller variant of 2126.

chains.display_name: 270 Heavy Duty Engineered Class Roller Chain
chains.description: 2.609" pitch 270-class heavy duty engineered roller chain. Large 1.13" roller diameter. Rated 3,500 lb working load — heaviest standard 2.609" engineered class chain. Preferred for severe bulk material, mining, and aggregate applications.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Uniking primary baseline. Rexnord 270 / Link-Belt SS2004. Largest standard 2.609" engineered chain.

chains.description: 2.609" pitch 81X engineered class bushed roller chain. CARB pins, TH rollers. Rated 2,000 lb working load. Industry standard for bulk material conveyors in aggregate, mining, recycling, and grain handling.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Uniking primary baseline. Rexnord 81X / Link-Belt RS81X cross-reference. Industry-standard 2.609" bulk conveyor chain.

chains.description: 2.609" pitch 81XH heavy series engineered class chain. TH pins and sidebars (thicker than 81X). Rated 2,500 lb working load for heavy-duty bulk material conveying.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Uniking primary baseline. Rexnord 81XH / Link-Belt RS81XHN. Heavy series — thicker sidebars vs standard 81X.

chains.display_name: 81XHH Extra Heavy Engineered Class Roller Chain
chains.description: 2.609" pitch 81XHH extra heavy engineered class chain. Heaviest sidebar in the 81X family. Rated 2,500 lb working load with maximum fatigue life. For severe-duty bulk material conveying.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord 81XHH / Link-Belt RS81XHN. Extra heavy — heaviest 81X series.

source_refs.notes: Same LB code as 81XH — verify with manufacturer

chains.display_name: A2800 8" Heavy Duty Engineered Class Chain
chains.description: 8" pitch A2800 extra-heavy engineered class roller chain. CIH (Circumferentially Induction Hardened) pins. 3.50" roller. Rated 9,800 lb working load. Heaviest bulk material conveying applications.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.6
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord A2800. CIH pin construction. 8" pitch maximum load chain.

chains.description: 2.609" pitch C1288 engineered class chain. CARB pins and bushings. Equivalent to 81X with slightly different sidebar geometry. Rated 2,000 lb working load.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord C1288 / Link-Belt SS1088. Similar rating to 81X, different geometry.

chains.description: 9" pitch ER911 engineered class roller chain. CARB pins, 3.00" roller. Rated 4,650 lb working load. Heavy drag and scraper conveying in cement and aggregate.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.7
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord ER911 / Link-Belt RS911.

chains.display_name: ER922 9" Heavy Duty Engineered Class Chain
chains.description: 9" pitch ER922 heavy duty engineered class roller chain with white iron rollers. Rated 7,200 lb working load. Maximum heavy duty bulk material drag conveying.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.7
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord ER922 / Link-Belt SS927. White iron rollers for abrasive materials.

chains.description: 1.654" pitch engineered class bushed roller chain. Carburized pins, TH rollers and bushings. Rated 1,650 lb working load. Used in light bulk material conveying, aggregate, and grain applications.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Uniking primary baseline. Rexnord RR362 / Link-Belt RS625 cross-reference.

chains.description: 1.654" pitch TH-pin engineered class roller chain. Heavier construction than RR362. Rated 2,100 lb working load for light-to-medium bulk material conveying.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Uniking primary baseline. Rexnord RR432 / Link-Belt RS627 cross-reference.

chains.description: 2.609" pitch RR588 heavy engineered class roller chain. CARB pins, TH bushings. Rated 2,500 lb working load — heavier sidebar than RR778.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord RR588 / Link-Belt RS887.

chains.description: 2.609" pitch RR778 engineered class chain. Heavier than 81X — CARB pins, TH bushings. Rated 2,300 lb working load. Preferred for medium-heavy bulk conveying.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord RR778 / Link-Belt RS886.

chains.display_name: SR1114 6" Heavy Duty Engineered Class Chain
chains.description: 6" pitch SR1114 heavy duty engineered class roller chain. Rated 4,200 lb working load. Preferred for high-capacity cement, aggregate, and bulk drag conveyors.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.5
performance_tiers.notes: Uniking primary baseline. Rexnord SR1114 / Link-Belt RS1114.

chains.description: 6" pitch SR196 engineered class roller chain. CARB pins and bushings. 2.00" roller face. Rated 2,600 lb working load. Used in heavy drag conveyors, aggregate, cement, and mining applications.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.4
performance_tiers.notes: Rexnord SR196 / Link-Belt RS6018. 6" pitch engineered class.

chains.display_name: SS1044 Engineered Class Bushed Chain (No Roller)
chains.description: 3" pitch SS1044 engineered class chain without rollers. Solid barrel bushed construction. Rides on track/guide rails. Used in drag and scraper conveyors for grain, aggregate, and bulk material.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.9
performance_tiers.notes: Uniking primary baseline — bushed no-roller class. Link-Belt SS1044.

chains.display_name: SS2184 Heavy Bushed Engineered Chain (No Roller)
chains.description: 6" pitch SS2184 heavy bushed engineered chain without rollers. High load drag and scraper conveying applications in cement, aggregate, and mining.

performance_tiers.source: Uniking Industrial Bulk Material Catalog p.10
performance_tiers.notes: Uniking primary baseline — 6" pitch bushed no-roller.

chains.description: MSR10028 extra-heavy bushed roller chain for the most demanding industrial applications.

performance_tiers.source: Allied-Locke

chains.description: MSR Class bushed roller steel conveyor chain with 18" face width. Heavy-duty drag and conveying applications.

performance_tiers.source: Allied-Locke

source_refs.notes: Uniking baseline = Rexnord SR196 / Link-Belt RS6018, 6" pitch with rollers

chains.description: MSR8028 heavy bushed roller conveyor chain, 28" face width. For extreme-load drag and conveying.

performance_tiers.source: Allied-Locke

source_refs.notes: Uniking baseline — 8" pitch heavy engineered class

chains.description: MXS Class offset sidebar steel drive chain. Used in heavy drag conveyors, reciprocating and horizontal conveyors.

performance_tiers.source: Allied-Locke

chains.description: SS118 large-pitch bushed steel conveyor chain for heavy drag and elevating applications.

performance_tiers.source: Allied-Locke

chains.description: SS188 heavy-pitch bushed steel chain for maximum load elevating and drag applications.

performance_tiers.source: Allied-Locke

chains.description: SS Class solid roller bushed steel conveyor chain. No rollers — rides directly on track. Used in conveying applications where rollers are not required.

performance_tiers.source: Allied-Locke

chains.description: SS88 heavy solid-barrel bushed steel conveyor chain. No rollers. Heavy-duty version of the SS series.
